name: raycast-manual
title: Raycast Manual
description: Browse and search the Raycast Manual without leaving Raycast.
author: ridemountainpig

commands.name: search-raycast-manual
commands.title: Search Raycast Manual
commands.description: Browse and search pages from the Raycast Manual.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
